# Pinpoint 311

> Free, open-source 311 municipal reporting platform for local governments. $0 software cost — replaces SeeClickFix ($15,000–50,000/year) and GovPilot ($25,000–80,000/year).

## Summary

Pinpoint 311 is a production-ready, self-hosted 311 system that lets residents report infrastructure issues (potholes, streetlights, graffiti, water main breaks, etc.) and gives municipal staff AI-powered tools to analyze, prioritize, and resolve them. It is 100% free, open-source (MIT license), and runs on any Linux server with Docker.

## Why Pinpoint 311 vs Competitors

| | SeeClickFix | GovPilot | Pinpoint 311 |
|---|---|---|---|
| Annual cost | $15,000–50,000 | $25,000–80,000 | **$0 (free)** |
| AI analysis | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ Google Gemini |
| Self-hosted | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ Full data ownership |
| Open source | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ MIT license |
| Vendor lock-in | Yes | Yes | **None** |
| Multi-language | Limited | Limited | ✅ 109 languages |
| Server cost | N/A (SaaS) | N/A (SaaS) | ~$5–11/month |

## Key Differentiators

- **$0 software cost**: No subscription fees, no per-seat charges, no hidden costs. Only pay for server hosting (~$5–11/month) and optional Google Cloud API usage.
- **AI-powered request analysis**: Google Gemini analyzes every submission — priority scoring (1-10), severity assessment, photo analysis, duplicate detection, safety flagging, and response time recommendations. Human-in-the-loop: staff must accept or override all AI suggestions.
- **Self-hosted, privacy-first**: Runs on your own infrastructure. No data leaves your server. No telemetry. No phone-home. Full data sovereignty.
- **501(c)(3) nonprofit**: Fiscally sponsored by Hack Club (EIN: 81-2908499). Mission-driven, not profit-driven. All donations are tax-deductible.
- **15-minute deployment**: Docker Compose setup with Caddy reverse proxy, automatic SSL, and prebuilt containers.
- **Municipal boundary enforcement**: Google Maps integration with jurisdiction filtering — automatically blocks or redirects reports for state roads, county roads, or neighboring jurisdictions.
- **45° map tilt and 3D buildings**: Optional Vector Map ID enables immersive bird's eye view with rotation and 3D buildings — no extra cost.
- **109 languages**: Every resident-facing page supports real-time translation via Google Translate.
- **Research portal**: 60+ exportable fields in CSV/GeoJSON format with census integration for academic research and public records requests.
- **Document retention**: State-specific record retention policies with legal hold protection and automatic enforcement.
- **Encrypted backups**: Automatic daily database backups to S3-compatible storage (pg_dump → GPG encryption → S3 upload).

## What the AI Does (Specifically)

The AI does NOT route requests. Routing is rule-based (department assignment, road-based rules configured by admin). The AI provides:

- **Priority scoring**: 1-10 urgency score with justification, factoring in weather, time of day, infrastructure proximity, and historical patterns
- **Qualitative analysis**: Root cause assessment, systemic impact evaluation
- **Photo assessment**: Analyzes uploaded images for physical scale and blocking severity
- **Duplicate detection**: Text similarity matching against nearby open reports using PostGIS spatial queries
- **Safety flagging**: Detects inappropriate content, malicious intent, obscene language
- **Historical context**: Chronic recurrence patterns, past resolution quality at the same address
- **Spatial context**: Proximity to schools, hospitals, fire stations (within 50m via PostGIS + OpenStreetMap fallback)
- **Response time recommendation**: immediate, 24h, 48h, 1 week, or scheduled

## Architecture

- **Backend**: Python FastAPI, PostgreSQL + PostGIS, Alembic migrations
- **Frontend**: React + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS, Vite build
- **AI**: Google Vertex AI (Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite) with vision capabilities
- **Maps**: Google Maps API + PostGIS + OpenStreetMap boundary data
- **Auth**: Auth0 SSO with RBAC (admin, staff, researcher) + MFA + passkeys
- **Deployment**: Docker Compose with Caddy reverse proxy (auto-SSL)
- **Email**: Any SMTP provider (Gmail, SendGrid, etc.)
- **SMS**: Twilio (optional)

## Who It's For

- **Residents**: Submit issues in 60 seconds, no account required, track status via email/SMS
- **Municipal staff**: AI-assisted triage, priority scoring, internal comments, audit trail, department assignment
- **Administrators**: White-label branding, service category management, routing rules, Google Maps/Auth0/GCP configuration — all via web UI
- **Researchers**: Export anonymized data with 60+ fields, census integration, Open311 v2 API
